_comment: Distilled from PTCA, Systemic thrombolysis, CABG, IABP_Medco.pdf and PTCA, Systemic thrombolysis, CABG, IABP_PPD.CPD.pdf
procedure_name: Low Cardiac Output syndrome requiring IABP insertion post - operatively
min_doctor_qualification: M.Ch. or DNB (cardiovascular thoracic surgery) or equivalent
clinical_indications: Patient has a recent history of CABG
Patient developed deterioration in Cardiovascular Status Post CABG
Used as an add on package to CABG
Clinical notes justify poor hemodynamics and high usage of inotropic agents

clinical_thresholds.note: Incidence of IABP use in this hospital in the last one year

preauth.label: Cardiac enzymes (Troponins T/ I (if not available then CPK-MB)
Routine Biochemistry (Haemogram, urea, creatinine, electrolytes, sugar, fasting lipids, Liver function test, Urinalysis)

claim.label: Still image of the patient undergoing the procedure with date & time
Post op Chest X-ray showing sternal sutures
Clinical notes / Indoor case papers showing poor hemodynamics and high usage of inotropic agents

ppd_preauth.q: Patient has a recent history of CABG- Yes
Patient developed deterioration in Cardiovascular Status Post CABG- Yes
Used as an add on package to CABG- Yes
Is the incidence of IABP use >15% in this hospital in the last one year- No
Do the clinical notes justify poor hemodynamics and high usage of inotropic agents- Yes

cpd_claim.q: Do the documents show history of recent CABG?
Is there a documentary evidence showing left ventricular ejection failure/ deterioration?
Do the clinical notes/ indoor case papers justify poor hemodynamics and high usage of inotropic agents?

common_queries: Patient does not have a recent history of CABG.
Patient has not developed deterioration in Cardiovascular Status Post CABG.
IABP not used as an add-on package to CABG.
Incidence of IABP use in the hospital is greater than 15% in the last one year.
Clinical notes do not justify poor hemodynamics and high usage of inotropic agents.
Barcode of IABP used not uploaded at claim.
Clinical notes / Indoor case papers showing poor hemodynamics and high usage of inotropic agents not uploaded at claim.
Post op Chest X-ray showing sternal sutures not uploaded at claim.

additional_information.special_empanelment: Cardiac catheterization lab, Cardiac Care Unit & qualified Cardiologist (for PTCA/ PCI/ IABP)/ qualified cardiothoracic surgeon (for CABG)
